query:
INSERT INTO bep_block_info (
                        file_name,  
                        file_folder,  
                        file_device,  
                        offset,
                        bi_size,
                        hash,
                        weak_hash,
                        storage_status
                    )
                    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                    ON CONFLICT(file_name, file_folder, file_device, offset, bi_size, hash) DO NOTHING
